calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-19-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jul-15-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Kevin Wallace, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Telekenex, Inc.
Theresa Zabot, Contract Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Nationwide Home relief of California, Inc.
Default was entered against defendant on February 2, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed on June 4, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Telekenex, Inc., and against the Defaulted Defendant Nationwide Home Relief of California, Inc. as follows:

Damages/Principal - $686,940.52.
Prejudgment Interest - Waived.
Attorney's Fees - Waived.
Costs - Waived, for a total judgment in the amount of $686,940.52.

Judgement was submitted to and signed by the Court.
